mnemonics: Framing: Firsts Are Really Made In Nice Places
Flow Control: Filling Our Lines With Care Today
Error Control: Eyes Really Care, Looking Out Narrowly
Connectionless: Cats Often Knock Out Nice People's Doorsteps
Connection Oriented: Cats Only Need One Way To Open Doors
Data link layer protocols: DOLLY protocol makes Learning Easy
High Level Data Link: Helping Lovely Data Link Experts
keyPoints: The data link layer is responsible for framing, error control, and connection management.
Flow control prevents network congestion by regulating the amount of data sent.
Error control mechanisms such as checksums and cyclic redundancy checks ensure data integrity.
Connectionless protocols do not establish a dedicated connection before data transfer.
Connection-oriented protocols establish a dedicated connection before data transfer.
Data link layer protocols such as LLC (Logical Link Control) manage data transfer between devices.
The data link layer provides high-level data link services to ensure reliable data transfer.
